3151470.name: Spring Escape Deep Down Demo
3151470.description:
In the depths of a forgotten laboratory, a plant awakens.

Spring Escape Deep Down Demo is here! Offering a vast look at the world of Spring Escape! With lots of challenges to face, secrets to uncover, and a threat lurking in the background...

This demo includes:

  • 4 levels full of obstacles

  • Purchasable colors for your flowery friend

  • Blossom time, a time attack mode unlocked upon beating a level, think you can reach the top of the online leaderboards?

  • NPS logs, get enough drop crystals on every level to uncover the buried details of the laboratory

  • A dangerous creature blocking the way forward...

  • ...a path...?

WHAT IS SPRING ESCAPE?

Spring Escape is a thrilling 2D platformer about a flower and a piece of dirt, Patchy and Tulip

One day, the two awaken from a vase into the depths of a long abandoned laboratory, the Testing Grounds, and together they set out to find a way to the surface. Along the journey they'll meet "helpful" allies like the shopkeeper Daisy, a Gerbera Daisy that can teach Tulip to change the colors of his petal for the price of a handful tasty crystals, and great dangers like the giant worm rumored to target anything that moves around the depths.

The gameplay centers around moving with grace through levels packed with obstacles, Patchy and Tulip have plenty of moves to get through the dangerous environments they'll find themselves in, in particular they can plant themselves inside dirt and move through them with ease, however different types of dirt can lead to wildly different behaviours.

Spring Escape aims to be a simple, yet packed and extremely enjoyable game, not breaking new grounds but providing a constant quality and fun experience. With a linear yet compelling story, an exciting campaign and lots of side and post-game content that will have you replay the game in wildly different ways and face brand new challenges.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
